  - Analyzed + transcribed both videos (analyze_incoming_videos.py; manifest in docs/incoming_videos_2026-07/).

  - Added both portrait (1080x1920) video embeds to farms/fazenda-sao-jorge-bahia/index.html (grid layout, max-width 420px, 9:16 aspect).
  - Synced blog listing thumbnails (listing-640w/) and ran sync_post_open_graph_images.py.
  - Re-authorized OAuth token (youtube_oauth_reauthorize.py) to fix insufficientPermissions on title sync; ran youtube_update_video_titles.py (all titles already in sync).
  - Committed 28 files (farm page, 2 blog posts, thumbnails, YouTube mapping), PR #181 merged + synced to prod.
